title: Spatial dissimilarity analysis in single-cell transcriptomics.
author: Shi Q Kristiansen K
content: S-EPMC12539255 PMC12539255 Spatial dissimilarity analysis in single-cell transcriptomics. We develop the spatial dissimilarity method to uncover complex bivariate relationships in single-cell and spatial transcriptomics data, addressing challenges such as alternative splicing and allele-specific
